hero.name: Mihai Gaina
hero.title: GIS Developer / Geomatician
hero.subtitle: From computer science to field instrumentation, from sensors to maps -- I turn geospatial data into practical solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Passionate geomatician and GIS developer, I combine expertise in spatial analysis, remote sensing and web development to transform geospatial data into practical solutions. Holder of a Master's degree in Geomatics (Universite Paris 8) and experienced in field instrumentation at Socotec Monitoring, I master the entire geographic data processing chain.

analyseSpatiale.title: Multi-Criteria Spatial Analysis -- Saint-Etienne
analyseSpatiale.description: Identifying optimal zones for real estate investment and student housing in Saint-Etienne. AHP weighting + WLC aggregation on 5 criteria (land value, flood risk, proximity to universities/stations/bars) using ArcGIS Pro and IDRISI. M1 Geomatics project, Universite Paris 8.
analyseSpatiale.longDescription:
This Master 1 Geomatics project at Universite Paris 8 aimed to identify optimal zones for real estate investment and student housing in Saint-Etienne.

The methodology is based on multi-criteria spatial analysis combining the AHP (Analytic Hierarchy Process) method for criteria weighting and WLC (Weighted Linear Combination) aggregation on 5 criteria: land value, flood risk, proximity to universities, train stations and bars.

Tools used include ArcGIS Pro for GIS processing, IDRISI for multi-criteria analysis, and open data from OpenStreetMap. The results mapped the most suitable areas for investment according to different decision-maker profiles.

teledetection.title: Sentinel-2 Remote Sensing
teledetection.description: Satellite image analysis for vegetation monitoring (NDVI) using SNAP and Python.
teledetection.longDescription:
Remote sensing project using Sentinel-2 satellite images for vegetation monitoring via NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) calculation.

Image processing was performed using ESA's SNAP (Sentinel Application Platform) software, including atmospheric corrections, resampling and spectral index calculations. Python scripts were developed to automate temporal analysis and generate maps of vegetation cover evolution.

cladPrimeco.title: Clad-Primeco
cladPrimeco.description: Business website with admin dashboard, content management and e-commerce.
cladPrimeco.longDescription:
Full development of a professional website for the Clad-Primeco company, including an administration dashboard, content management and e-commerce features.

Tech stack: React 18 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS for styling, Supabase for backend (authentication, PostgreSQL database, Edge Functions). The site integrates a secure contact system with Resend for emails and hCaptcha for anti-spam protection.

Deployment is handled via Vercel with an automated CI/CD pipeline.
